claims.claim_title: Comparative input rejection remains explicit and reproducible
claims.summary: Rootedness, branch-length completeness, and numeric-response guards are captured as governed runtime evidence instead of informal expectations.

claims.claim_title: Weak phylogenetic signal instability remains visible
claims.summary: A governed low-information signal case is rerun across fixed seeds so threshold-sensitive conclusions do not hide behind one lucky pass.

claims.claim_title: OU identifiability boundary warnings are detected on reference cases
claims.summary: Known small-sample and weak-pull OU pathologies stay visible through the canonical runtime audit instead of being implied away.
